full_text:
Zhuge Jin (Ziyu) 諸葛瑾 (子瑜)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Jin (諸葛瑾), styledZiyu (子瑜), was born in Langye. Zhuge Liang’s older brother in service to Wu. Highly trusted by Sun Quan. Zhuge Jin was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Zhuge Jin lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
